author: śrīla saccidānanda bhaktibinoda ṭhākura
verses:
rāgāveśe vraja⋅dhāma⋅, vāse jadi tīvra kāma,
thāke tava hṛdaya⋅bhitare
rādhā⋅kṛṣṇa⋅līlārasa, paricaryā⋅sulālasa,
hoo jadi nitānta antare

bali tabe, śuna, mama mana
bhajana caturavara, śrī⋅svarūpadāmodara,
prabhusevā jā̐hāra jīvana

sagaṇa śrī⋅rūpa⋅yini, rasatattva⋅jñānamaṇi,
līlātattva je kaila prakāśa
tā̐hāra agraja bhāi, jā̐hāra samāna nāi,
varṇila je jugalavilāsa

sei saba mahājane, spaṣṭaprema⋅vijñāpane,
smara, mana tumi nirantara
bhaktivinodera nati, mahājanagaṇa⋅prati,
vijñāpita karaha satvara
en_translation:
If there is an intense desire within your heart for residing in the holy land of Vraja with great attachment, and if you deeply desire the sweet nectar of Rādhā and Kṛṣṇa's pastimes and Their service,

Then I say, listen, my mind, to the best of those expert in worship, Śrī Svarūpa Dāmodara, whose very life is the service of the Lord.

Together with his associates, Śrīla Rūpa Gosvāmī—who is a jewel of knowledge of transcendental mellows and who revealed the truth of the Lord's pastimes—and his elder brother, who has no equal, have described the pastimes of the Divine Couple.

Remember those great personalities with clear declarations of love continuously, O my mind. Make Bhaktivinoda's obeisances quickly known to those great personalities.
